queries.question: Show me dance recitals and talent shows which are taking place in audition Room 101.
queries.sql:
SELECT Dance_Recitals.name
FROM Dance_Recitals
WHERE Dance_Recitals.Audition_Room = "Room 101"
UNION
SELECT Talent_Shows.name
FROM Talent_Shows
WHERE Talent_Shows.Audition_Room = "Room 101"
